hero_section.title: Herbal Hair dye-1
hero_section.short_description: This is a plant based formulation that use natural pigment from leaves and roots to colour hair without use of synthetic chemicals. This also provides deep conditioning effect.

story_section.heading: Pure ritual, honest formulation.
story_section.description: This is a plant based formulation that use natural pigment from leaves and roots to colour hair without use of synthetic chemicals. This also provides deep conditioning effect.
main_benefits: Completely free from Ammonia and PPD
safety_warnings: Even though it is a natural product, Patch test is mandatory
storage_instructions: Keep in an air tight container in room temperature
how_to_use: Take the required amount of powder in a bowl. Add 1 spoon of curd, Mix with enough water and keep it overnight, Next day morning, apply in hair and leave it for one hour, Rinse well without Shampoo, Visible results will be seen during repeated usage. Hair will be natural black and will stay upto 10 days.

how_to_use: Apply step 2 pack on the next day of applying Step 1, Take the required amount of powder and mix in boiling water and leave it overnight so that the colour has to turn out to blue, Next day morning apply in hair and and leave it for one hour and rinse well without shampoo. Visible results will be seen during repeated usage. Hair will be natural black and will stay upto 10 days.

hero_section.title: Shikkakaai Shampoo Paste
hero_section.short_description: Shikkakai has been used in India for thousands of years as a natural alternative to soap, unlike modern shampoos that are liquid based, a shikkakai shampoo paste is a concentrated, gritty, and incredibly potent version that preserves the natural saponins without excessive processing.
